case_title: MCDONALD MACELA MRS. VS LEIGHTON LINDA, MANAGEMENT HERALD APT.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCDONALD MACELA MRS. AS TO DEFENDANT LEIGHTON LINDA, MANAGEMENT HERALD APT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEIGHTON LINDA, MANAGEMENT HERALD APT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDONALD MACELA MRS. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEIGHTON LINDA, MANAGEMENT HERALD APT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
